title: Order counts by country, by status, and overall
prompt: In a single query using GROUP BY GROUPING SETS, return order counts grouped three ways: by country alone, by status alone, and overall (one grand-total row) — but NOT the country×status combinations. Columns: country, status, orders. Order by country then status, NULLs last.

generic: SELECT c.country, o.status, COUNT(*) AS orders
JOIN orders o ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id
ORDER BY c.country NULLS LAST, o.status NULLS LAST

hints: GROUPING SETS lets you list exactly which groupings you want.
Use ((country), (status), ()) — the empty set () is the grand total.
